sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: Uber Technologies, Inc의 공시 핵심을 한국어로 요약했습니다.

keyPoints.text: 4분기 총예약액이 541억 달러로 22% 성장했고 매출은 144억 달러로 20% 늘었습니다.
GAAP 영업이익은 130% 급증한 18억 달러, 조정 EBITDA는 35% 증가한 25억 달러였습니다.
비GAAP 순이익은 25% 증가한 15억 달러, 비GAAP 주당순이익은 27% 늘어난 0.71달러였습니다.

businessChanges.text: 운행 건수가 22% 증가한 38억 건을 기록했으며, 월간 활성 플랫폼 이용자(MAPC)가 18% 늘었습니다.
최고재무책임자는 자율주행(AV) 분야 세계 최대 운행 촉진 기업으로 자리매김했다고 밝혔습니다.

financialHighlights.text: 분기 영업활동 현금흐름은 29억 달러, 잉여현금흐름은 28억 달러로 분기 최대를 기록했고, 분기 말 현금성자산은 76억 달러였습니다.
2025년 연간 총예약액은 1,930억 달러, 잉여현금흐름은 100억 달러에 달했습니다.

watchItems.text: 1분기 총예약액 가이던스 520억 달러 안팎을 제시한 가운데 5년 이상 이어온 20%대 성장세가 지속될지가 핵심입니다.
이익이 매출을 웃도는 속도로 확대되는 수익성 개선 추세에 주목할 필요가 있습니다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: EX-99.1 2 uberq425earningspressrelea.htm EX-99.1 Document Exhibit 99.1 Uber Announces Results for Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Quarterly trips grew 22% year-over-year and Gross Bookings grew 22% year-over-year Record quarterly GAAP Income from operations of $1.8 billion; Adjusted EBITDA of $2.5 billion, up 35% year-over-year Record quarterly operating cash flow of $2.9 billion and Free cash flow of $2.8 billion SAN FRANCISCO – February 4, 2026 – Uber Technologies, Inc. (NYSE: UBER) today announced financial results for the quarter and full year ended December 31, 2025. “Uber accelerated into another record-breaking quarter, with more than 200 million monthly users completing more than 40 million trips every day—our largest and most engaged consumer base ever,” sa  Normalized numeric aliases: $1.8 billion = 18억 달러; $2.5 billion = 25억 달러; $2.9 billion = 29억 달러; $2.8 billion = 28억 달러; 200 million = 2억 달러; 40 million = 4,000만 달러; $1.8 = 1.8달러; $2.5 = 2.5달러; $2.8 = 2.8달러; $2.9 = 2.9달러.

ing the largest facilitator of AV trips in the world.” “Our performance this year reflects the significant power of our platform strategy, with $193 billion in Gross Bookings and $10 billion in free cash flow,” said Prashanth Mahendra-Rajah, CFO. “Uber is a once-in-a-generation company with enormous opportunity still ahead, and it has been a true privilege—and a great deal of fun—to have played my part in its success.” “After five years of 20%+ growth, we are entering 2026 with strong momentum, while remaining solidly on track to deliver on our three-year growth and profit outlook,” said Balaji Krishnamurthy, incoming CFO. “With large and growing free cash flows, over the coming years we will invest with discipline across a multitude of opportunities, including positioning Uber to win in an AV future.” Financial and Operational Highlights for Fourth Quarter 2025 • Trips during the qu  Normalized numeric aliases: $193 billion = 1,930억 달러; $10 billion = 100억 달러; $193 = 193달러; $10 = 10달러.

r grew 22% year-over-year (“YoY”) to 3.8 billion, driven by Monthly Active Platform Consumers (“MAPCs") growth of 18% YoY and monthly Trips per MAPC growth of 3% YoY. • Gross Bookings grew 22% YoY to $54.1 billion, and 22% on a constant currency basis. • Revenue grew 20% YoY to $14.4 billion, or 19% on a constant currency basis. • GAAP Income from operations grew 130% YoY to $1.8 billion. • GAAP Net income attributable to Uber Technologies, Inc. was $296 million, which includes a $1.6 billion net headwind (pre-tax) from revaluations of Uber’s equity investments. GAAP Diluted earnings per share (“EPS”) was $0.14. • Adjusted EBITDA grew 35% YoY to $2.5 billion. Adjusted  Normalized numeric aliases: 3.8 billion = 38억 달러; $54.1 billion = 541억 달러; $14.4 billion = 144억 달러; $1.8 billion = 18억 달러; $296 million = 2억 9,600만 달러; $1.6 billion = 16억 달러; $2.5 billion = 25억 달러; $1.9 billion = 19억 달러; $14.4 = 14.4달러; $2.5 = 2.5달러; $1.8 = 1.8달러; $296 = 296달러; $1.6 = 1.6달러; $0.14 = 0.14달러; $1.9 = 1.9달러.

in Q4 2024. • Non-GAAP Net Income grew 25% YoY to $1.5 billion and Non-GAAP EPS grew 27% YoY to $0.71. • Net cash provided by operating activities was $2.9 billion and free cash flow, defined as net cash flows from operating activities less capital expenditures, was $2.8 billion. • Unrestricted cash, cash equivalents, and short-term investments were $7.6 billion at the end of the fourth quarter. Outlook for Q1 2026 For Q1 2026, we anticipate: • Gross Bookings of $52.0 billion to $53.5 billion, representing growth of 17% to 21% YoY on a constant currency basis. ◦ Our outlook assumes a roughly 4 percentage-point currency tailwind to total reported Y  Normalized numeric aliases: $1.5 billion = 15억 달러; $2.9 billion = 29억 달러; $2.8 billion = 28억 달러; $7.6 billion = 76억 달러; $52.0 billion = 520억 달러; $53.5 billion = 535억 달러; $2.37 billion = 23억 7,000만 달러; $2.47 billion = 24억 7,000만 달러; $0.71 = 0.71달러; $53.5 = 53.5달러; $52.0 = 52.0달러; $0.65 = 0.65달러; $0.72 = 0.72달러; $2.37 = 2.37달러; $2.47 = 2.47달러.
